results.title: DFT and OSMEP Invite Guangzhou Consumers to Discover Premium Thai Rice at “Thai Rice Roadshow”
results.description: BANGKOK, THAILAND – Media OutReach Newswire – 13 July 2026 – The Department of Foreign Trade (DFT), Ministry of Commerce of Thailand, together with the Office of Small and Medium Enterprises Promotion (OSMEP), invites consumers in Guangzhou to experience the premium quality of Thai rice at “Thai Rice Roadshow: Think Rice Think Thailand – We [...] The post DFT and OSMEP Invite Guangzhou Consumers to Discover Premium Thai Rice at “Thai Rice Roadshow” appeared first on Forever NEWS .

results.title: ETPL builds global media footprint with major broadcast rights agreements
results.description: The post ETPL builds global media footprint with major broadcast rights agreements appeared first on SportsMint Media . The ETPL has taken a step towards its inaugural season after securing a comprehensive international broadcast distribution network. The post ETPL builds global media footprint with major broadcast rights agreements appeared first on SportsMint Media .

results.title: God of War Laufey physical disc confirmed by Santa Monica Studio
results.description: Santa Monica Studio reassures fans the game won't be digital-only, fuelling speculation of a 2027 release
